warm_up:
Warm-up
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat

strength.name: Snatch Balance
strength.description:
1x3 | E2MOM 8min
Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3

hypertrophy.reasoning: Posterior chain and arm hypertrophy offset lower body fatigue while maintaining pulling balance post-snatch.
